engine.gateway.llm_error_default:
[Manboster] Failed to get message from LLMProvider {{ .Name }}, model {{ .Model }}, get error: {{ .Error }}
You can resend your message or check the API's availability.
engine.gateway.llm_error_rate_limit: [Manboster] Provider {{ .Name }}, Model {{ .Model }} has been suffering a very high traffic and triggered rate limit, please try again later or change provider's models.
engine.gateway.llm_error_down: [Manboster] Provider {{ .Name }} has been down, please check your provider's status page, or change providers and try again later.
engine.gateway.llm_error_timeout: [Manboster] It seems that there is a connection issue between you and provider {{ .Name }}, please check your internet connection and try again.
engine.gateway.llm_error_auth: [Manboster] Access denied or unauthorized in provider {{ .Name }}, please check your API key or other credentials is valid.
engine.gateway.trytimes: [Manboster] The request of LLM provider encounters an error, now retry, {{ .Count }} times...
